title: T3 Ingestion: L2b rollout harness DESIGN
prompt: Design — do NOT build — the L2b rollout harness, the eval ladder's biggest named infra gap (docs/eval-architecture.md line 36: 'unbuilt — known gap'): held-out task sets per capability station, an assertion-first scoring rubric with a pinned+calibrated judge for at most 4 fuzzy dims, and an interactive-only engine-dispatched execution environment with no-skill/candidate/current-canonical arms. Deliverables: backlog/specs/l2b-rollout-harness-spec.md at spec-written state (12 pinned sections incl. record schema carrying the living-system spec's six L2b fields, a 5-task code-review pilot appendix, and an ordered T3-16 build plan), one registry entry appended to backlog/specs/tickets.json (next free DF-key, expected DF-11), two surgical status lines in docs/eval-architecture.md, and a David-ratification report at backlog/wargames/proof/T3-15/REPORT.md. Zero harness code, zero new data dirs — the build is war-game T3-16, gated on David ratifying this spec. Read and execute the war game at backlog/wargames/T3-15-rollout-harness-design.md. Follow its moves in order; on any failure signal apply the counter-move; on any abort condition stop and write needs-decision/.
verify: backlog/specs/l2b-rollout-harness-spec.md exists with a '**State:** spec-written' header and all pinned sections (Held-out task sets, Scoring rubric, Execution environment, Record schema, Baseline protocol, Leakage & refresh, Cost envelope, Pilot, Build plan, Open questions); it contains all six living-system L2b record fields (task_set, rollout_score, baseline_comparison, run_date, model, harness), references brains/evals + df8-comparison-registry + stability-1 as boundary owners, and carries >=5 pilot task_id blocks. backlog/specs/tickets.json parses and holds exactly one entry with spec_path backlog/specs/l2b-rollout-harness-spec.md at state spec-written. docs/eval-architecture.md no longer says 'L2b ❌gap-ish' and its L2b row says spec-written, with the total edit <=2 lines changed. backlog/wargames/proof/T3-15/REPORT.md exists with a David ratification checklist and at least the three mandatory findings (research/evals.jsonl never materialized; workflow.js Phase-5 plan superseded by Q4 engine doctrine; L3's requires-L2b dependency violated by the 76 provisional distillations). Negative: no evals/ dir, no tools/rollout-harness/ dir, research/ canonical/ engine/ and docs/dark-factory-living-system-spec.md all untouched per git status/diff. A commit whose message contains 'wg-t3-15' exists.
